canonical_definition: A comprehensive video dataset and benchmark designed to evaluate MLLMs on GUI understanding across six scenarios, with a focus on dynamic and sequential tasks.
papers: Ferret-UI 2: Mastering Universal User Interface Understanding Across Platforms
GUI-World: A Video Benchmark and Dataset for Multimodal GUI-oriented Understanding

definitions.text: A comprehensive video dataset and benchmark designed to evaluate MLLMs on GUI understanding across six scenarios, with a focus on dynamic and sequential tasks.
definitions.paper: GUI-World: A Video Benchmark and Dataset for Multimodal GUI-oriented Understanding

definitions.text: A multi-platform benchmark designed to evaluate UI agents on various tasks across iOS, Android, and Webpage environments.
definitions.paper: Ferret-UI 2: Mastering Universal User Interface Understanding Across Platforms

relationships.paper: GUI-World: A Video Benchmark and Dataset for Multimodal GUI-oriented Understanding
relationships.evidence: Likewise, we also establish a comprehensive benchmark for GUI understanding, which encompasses nine mainstream MLLMs (e.g., GPT-4o (OpenAI, 2024) and Gemini-1.5-Pro (Team et al., 2023)), five keyframe selection strategies (e.g., UVD (Zhang et al., 2024d)), and six GUI scenarios, aiming to provide a thorough evaluation of the GUI-oriented understanding capabilities of MLLMs. (Section 1)
